creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
Two ports, archivers/deco and misc deco produced one binary file in /usr/local/bin location.

theoretically that problem by "archivers-deco", who was made after misc-deco:

grep "Date create" /usr/ports/{archivers,misc}/deco/Makefile
/usr/ports/archivers/deco/Makefile:# Date created:              06 May 2008
/usr/ports/misc/deco/Makefile:# Date created:                           16 Dec 1997

But as whole, IMHO this problem in design, so at given time no warranty that such problem no appear in the future or already exist with currents ports.
(http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2009-April/054206.html)
